nasb.text: If he comes alone, he shall go out alone; if he is the husband of a wife, then his wife shall go out with him.

esv.text: If he comes in single, he shall go out single; if he comes in married, then his wife shall go out with him.

cnv.text: 他若是單身來，就可以單身出去；他若是有婦之夫，他的妻子就可以和他同去。

ccb.text: 倘若买他的时候，他是单身，那么期满的时候，他可以单身离开。如果他跟妻子一同被买，就可以带妻子一起离开。
